page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Highly parallel construction and indexing of colored and compacted de Bruijn graphs.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Highly parallel construction and indexing of colored and compacted de Bruijn graphs
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Bifrost is a command-line tool for sequencing that features a broad range of functions, such as indexing, editing, and querying the graph, and includes a graph coloring method that maps each k-mer of the graph to the genomes it occurs in.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Bifrost is a command-line tool for sequencing that features a broad range of functions, such as indexing, editing, and querying the graph, and includes a graph coloring method that maps each k-mer of the graph to the genomes it occurs in.
